title: How can I find the issues where I wrote an update?
excerpt:
On some issue I added an update some time ago. Now I cannot find that issue. I have tried the filter of the board but I don’t see an option to search the updates. I have tried Search Everything, without success. 
Perhaps…

posts.author: robopzet (Rob Schlüter)
posts.cookedHtml:
On some issue I added an update some time ago. Now I cannot find that issue. I have tried the filter of the board but I don’t see an option to search the updates. I have tried Search Everything, without success.

Perhaps there is a personal page that shows a log of all my activity on the site, ordered from new to old.

posts.author: NiiKiitA (Gustaf Olsson L)
posts.cookedHtml:
@robopzet
Maybe this will help you

Support

The Activity Log

5 min read Feature     Wondering how to keep track of your team's activity? The Activity Log is your answer. Stay in the loop at all times by tracking board changes in one place! There are...

It will show you an activity log of what you have been doing on a per board basis.
Hope this helps you out

/N

posts.author: robopzet (Rob Schlüter)
posts.cookedHtml: The Updates section on that window helped me find the issue.

posts.author: NiiKiitA (Gustaf Olsson L)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad to hear that
